overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a samurai warrior walking along a moonlit beach at night. The character traverses wet pebble shores and shallow water with atmospheric blue lighting and detailed coastal environment, featuring dynamic weather elements and natural coastal formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal shoreline with ocean on left and scattered trees on right

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily along the pebble beach with swords sheathed on back, moving parallel to the waterline while looking toward the distant shore

entered.detail: calm sea reflecting bright moonlight along the shoreline with gentle waves
wet rocky shore with small stones glistening in the blue moonlight
line of dark trees marking the forest edge along the coastline
bright full moon partially obscured by wispy clouds casting pale light
large dark rocks and headland visible in the misty distance along the shore

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a wide pebble beach at night, with calm ocean waters reflecting moonlight on the left and a line of coastal trees on the right. The scene is open and exposed, with the full moon providing illumination through scattered clouds, creating a serene blue atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water at the water's edge

events.description: character steps from dry pebble beach into shallow ocean water, creating ripples around their feet

agents.ego_description: samurai wading through ankle-deep water along the coastline, continuing steady forward movement with water splashing around sandals

segments.scene_description: The samurai steps from the pebble shore into the shallow ocean water, wading through the calm surf as the water reflects the moonlight around their feet. The coastal trees remain visible on the right while the open sea now surrounds the character's path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with approaching dense forest edge

events.description: character exits shallow water and steps back onto rocky beach terrain with larger stones

agents.ego_description: samurai continuing along the rocky shoreline moving away from the water's edge toward denser tree cover on the right, navigating larger rocks

entered.detail: prominent rocky formation rising from the water near the shore with jagged edges

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the samurai continues along the rockier section of the beach where larger stone outcrops emerge from the surf on the left. The forest edge draws noticeably closer on the right with denser tree coverage, while the moon remains visible through the clouds ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit coastline that shifts from an open pebble beach into shallow surf and finally toward a rugged, forested shore. It begins with the samurai walking across a wide expanse of pebbles under a serene blue sky, with calm ocean waters reflecting the moon on the left and a distant line of trees on the right. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions from the dry shore into the shallow ocean, where the samurai wades through calm surf that ripples around their feet. The camera then follows the warrior as they exit the water and enter a rockier stretch of beach, where large stone outcrops emerge from the surf. Finally, the environment closes in as the forest edge draws nearer with denser tree coverage, while the moon remains visible through scattered clouds ahead.
